exploration_notes: The E0505 error follows this call chain through the MIR borrow checker: (1) `compiler/rustc_borrowck/src/lib.rs` contains `access_place()` (line 1179) which calls `check_access_for_conflict()`. When a `WriteKind::Move` conflict with an active borrow is detected, it calls `report_move_out_while_borrowed()` (line 1362). (2) `compiler/rustc_borrowck/src/borrowck_errors.rs` defines `cannot_move_when_borrowed()` (line 16) on `MirBorrowckCtxt`, which constructs the `MoveBorrow` diagnostic struct. (3)
